checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_minus_30.offset_convention: Diagnostic only; t_2ave is not WRF history T.

checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_save_minus_30.offset_convention: OperationalCarry.t_save is total theta at this checkpoint; subtract 300 K.

final_carry.post_halo_state.theta_minus_.offset_convention: State.theta is total theta after post-RK halo; subtract 300 K.

final_carry.t_save_minus_300.name: final_carry.t_save_minus_300

next_decision: Open a WRF/JAX input-boundary emitter or hook sprint for explicit step-6000 pre-RK T/P/PB/MU/MUB before deciding any source-changing fix; do not start by editing final small_step_finish or history-source mapping.

mirrored_private_path.note: The proof-local RK wrapper mirrors private helpers so stage boundaries can be observed without editing src/.

tolerance.policy: No tolerance widening; inherited from the canonical h10 proof.

unresolved_risks: Only the selected Boole h10 patch and k=1 mass layer / kstag 0..1 W/PH source emitters were compared.
WRF has no separate full-domain step-5999 prestep emitter in the current artifact set; `T_OLD` is the narrowest available WRF input/reference theta surface.
The proof is CPU-only and intentionally does not run TOST or Switzerland validation.
verdict_reason: The earliest available WRF start-of-step/RK-reference theta surface (final-stage pre-small_step_finish T_OLD/grid%t_1) already differs from the real JAX step-5999 carry input before current-step physics or RK.
